text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 88 

MDCR_MC_MMP_MOS 

LABEL: Medicare-Medicaid Plan (MMP) Coverage Months 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the number of months during the year when the beneficiary was enrolled in a 
Medicare-Medicaid managed care plan. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MBSF (derived) 

VALUES: 0–12, or null/missing (if no Medicare enrollment) 

COMMENT: CCW creates this variable using the MBSF. We consider the beneficiary to be enrolled in
